caption:
All auto-captions look the same... 👇
That's why I'm honestly glad that @submagic.co released Captions Edit.
It's basically automatic subtitles with full creative control.

You can control:
• Font (size, stroke, shadows, etc.)
• Animations (word animation, emojis, etc.)
• Word count
• and a lot more!

I'll spare all the details and let you try it for FREE.
✅ Just click the link on my bio!

Or here: https://bit.ly/4bzCHIP

#submagic #autocaptions #creatortools #videoediting #videohacks
signals: discount codes or affiliate links mentioned
link in bio with brand context
